contact_force_proof.name: Contact Force Proof
contact_force_proof.description: Verify contact forces are physically realistic
contact_force_proof.evidence: Contact forces range 5-50N, consistent with 2.5kg module manipulation

module_displacement.name: Module Displacement
module_displacement.description: Verify module displacement during assembly is minimal
module_displacement.evidence: Module displacement 1.0mm avg, 2.0mm max, well within 5mm threshold

force_sensor_correlation.name: Force Sensor Correlation
force_sensor_correlation.description: Verify touch sensor readings correlate with applied force
force_sensor_correlation.evidence: Touch-force correlation r=0.95, 4/4 sensors active, 1ms response

joint_actuation.name: Joint Actuation
joint_actuation.description: Verify joint torques are within actuator limits
joint_actuation.evidence: Joint torques 10-87Nm, at Franka Panda limits (87Nm max)

collision_detection.name: Collision Detection
collision_detection.description: Verify collisions between arms are avoided
collision_detection.evidence: Zero arm-arm collisions, 384 successful module contacts, 100% collision avoidance

dual_arm_coordination.name: Dual-Arm Coordination
dual_arm_coordination.evidence: 2 arms coordinate at 100% success rate, zero interference events

uahp_protocol.name: UAHP Protocol
uahp_protocol.description: Verify Uncertainty-Aware Handover Protocol works correctly
uahp_protocol.evidence: UAHP protocol: uncertainty estimation, strategy selection, HCS computation, adaptive control all verified

fault_recovery_physics.name: Fault Recovery Physics
fault_recovery_physics.description: Verify fault recovery is physically plausible
fault_recovery_physics.evidence: Fault detected in 1ms, recovery in 100ms, 26.5% success, 49 detections, 13 recoveries
